title: Shared Stack Verify Contract
description: Domain-agnostic verify definitions reused by oma-backend and oma-mobile stack schemas via $ref.

pass_signal.description: Optional substring expected in stdout on pass (e.g., 'All tests passed').

skip_if_missing.description: Binary that, if absent from PATH, causes the check to skip (e.g., uv, cargo, swift).

detect.description: Relative path whose existence in the workspace selects this variant (e.g., package.json, Package.swift).
